title: lichen-sim: Protocol desync when recv_msg rejects oversized message
close_reason: Fixed: Added 'poisoned' flag to SimClient to track connection validity. When recv_msg detects an oversized message (len > MAX_MSG_LEN), the 4-byte header has been consumed but the body cannot be safely read (could be gigabytes). Setting poisoned=true prevents further use of the desynced connection. Both send_msg and recv_msg check this flag and return an error if the connection is poisoned.
